data.title: 国际服救护骑士团 "Saving Lives, Together!" 特别礼物
data.summary: Sensei! The Remedial Knights, who bring warmth to every corner of Kivotos, have a special announceme
data.body:
Sensei!

The Remedial Knights, who bring warmth to every corner of Kivotos, have a special announcement just for you.

As a token of gratitude for all you do for the students,
the members of the Remedial Knights have lovingly prepared a heartfelt surprise gift!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2842713

#BlueArchive
